title: Feature Root: takt upgrade asset manifest and version-aware project updates
description: Non-runnable feature container for manifest-backed init and upgrade work across onboarding and CLI surfaces. Child beads cover implementation, validation, documentation, and review sequencing.
acceptance_criteria: `takt init` writes a manifest for bundled assets and does not recreate it on reruns.
`takt upgrade` updates unmodified bundled assets, restores missing ones, installs new assets, preserves locally modified or user-owned files, and merges missing config keys.
`takt asset mark-owned`, `unmark-owned`, and `list` manage and report asset ownership state consistently with the upgrade flow.
Dry-run, removed-bundle disabling, and user-added skill protection are covered by tests and documented.
